title: LEGO Wicked Elphaba's Retreat - Forest Building Toy with 2 Mini Dolls & 2 Animal Figures plus Accessories - Gift for 7+ Year Old Girls & Movie Fans - 75687
features: WICKED TOYS FOR KIDS – Young builders can recreate scenes from the movie with the LEGO Wicked Elphaba’s Retreat building toy for 7+ year old girls, boys and fans of fantasy play
BUILDABLE FOREST TOY – This playset includes a hideout, 2 mini dolls, 2 forest animal figures and lots of movie-inspired accessories for hours of storytelling and role play
MAGICAL ROLE-PLAY FUN – Kids can relive Elphaba and Fiyero’s story, make secret plans or play with the 2 rabbit animal toys in this imaginative Wicked-themed set
FANTASY ROOM DECOR – With flowers and foliage, this buildable Wicked toy doubles as eye-catching kids’ room or shelf decor for girls, boys and Wicked movie lovers
WICKED GIFTS FOR 7+ YEAR OLD GIRLS AND BOYS – A creative toy and a fun fantasy gift for kids who love Wicked figures, magical stories and movie-themed animal toys
INTERACTIVE BUILDING EXPERIENCE – The LEGO Builder app lets kids zoom in and rotate models in 3D, helping them enjoy every step of their Wicked building toy journey
BRING HOME THE MAGIC – LEGO Wicked building toys let fans explore the world of Glinda and Elphaba with sets filled with fantasy details, mini dolls and animal figures
description: From the manufacturer Escape to the forest with this creative building toy Girls, boys and Wicked fans recreate a special movie moment as they build Elphaba’s toy forest hideout in LEGO bricks. Adventure playset of an iconic scene Fans recreate Elphaba’s special retreat, while playing out a magical moment from the Wicked: For Good movie. LEGO Wicked Elphaba’s Retreat Create a cosy atmosphere Light the hideout with the candles and lantern. Hidden features from the film Open Glinda’s book and find Elphaba’s pressed poppy. Hide Elphaba’s magical book The Grimmerie can be stowed away safely under the desk. Enter a digital world of building Builders can zoom in, rotate sets in 3D and track their progress using the fun, intuitive LEGO Builder app. Give the gift of Wicked movie magic Discover other LEGO Wicked merchandise (sets sold separately) that lets fans recreate magical movie moments.
